_comment: Species: Mountain Lion (山狮) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Mountain Lion

canonical.appearance: Lion 3 m long, fur earth-gold, mane of stone-spike fur, roar causes rockslides
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 600 jin; ancient 8 m, 10000 jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex predator of mountains; territory spans peaks; hunts by ambush from above
canonical.habitat: Mountain ranges, earth-aspected peaks, cliff caves
canonical.diet: mountain beasts, spirit-herb grazers, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Rival of giant savage apes; tributed by mountain-sects
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: mountain_lion — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
